headline: Science on the Square!
summary: We brought Radiant to a downtown booth so people could see remote sensing up close poster, drone rig, and live data on a laptop. We talked through how LiDAR, UAVs, and satellite observations support wildfire mapping, environmental monitoring, and planetary science, on the plaza.
imageAlt: Radiant researchers at a downtown outreach booth with remote sensing displays and a multi-rotor drone
